name: Waida Mfg. Co.,Ltd.
summary: Waida Mfg. Co.,Ltd. produces and sells machine tools, industrial machinery, measuring instruments, and controllers in Japan, China, rest of Asia, Europe, and the United States. The company provides various grinders, including profile, jig, grooving insert, surface infeed, profile, insert periphery, and milling tool grinders, as well as HAAS Multigrind grinding centers; and automatic chart marking systems. Its products have applications in manufacturing of drills/end mills/hobs, and index able insert tools; re-grinding of various tools; parts for precision dies, jigs, and tools; surface infeed grinding; and airplane-related turbine blades. The company was founded in 1933 and is headquartered in Takayama, Japan.
